hero.title: Master Croatian
hero.subtitle: Your personal AI-powered Croatian language tutor. Learn grammar, practice conversations, and immerse yourself in Croatian culture.

ai.title: AI-Powered Tutoring
ai.description: Chat with an intelligent AI mentor that adapts to your level and corrects your mistakes in real-time.

structured.title: Structured Lessons
structured.description: Grammar, reading, dictation, and communication lessons aligned to CEFR levels A1 through C2.

games.title: Fun Mini-Games
games.description: Learn through play with word matching, fill-in-the-blanks, and more interactive exercises.

media.title: Cultural Immersion
media.description: Learn vocabulary through memes, movie clips, and music from Croatian pop culture.

tracking.title: Progress Tracking
tracking.description: Track your streak, XP, and level progression with detailed statistics and insights.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Interface available in English, Russian, and Ukrainian with translations in all three languages.

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue your Croatian journey

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity. Start a lesson to begin!

placementTest.title: Placement Test
placementTest.subtitle: Let's determine your Croatian language level
placementTest.description: This test consists of multiple-choice questions covering grammar and vocabulary from A1 to C2 levels. Answer as many as you can!
placementTest.question: Question

results.title: Test Complete!
results.description: Based on your answers, we've determined your Croatian proficiency level.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Structured Croatian language learning
lessons.dictationInstructions: Listen to the audio and type what you hear in Croatian.

wordMatch.title: Word Match
wordMatch.description: Match Croatian words with their translations. Test your vocabulary knowledge!
wordMatch.instructions: Click on a Croatian word, then click its translation to make a match.

fillBlanks.title: Fill in the Blanks
fillBlanks.description: Complete Croatian sentences by choosing the correct word for each blank.
fillBlanks.instructions: Select the correct word to complete each sentence.

aiChat.title: AI Croatian Mentor
aiChat.subtitle: Practice Croatian with your AI language tutor
aiChat.placeholder: Type a message in Croatian or ask a question...

topics.greet: How to greet someone in Croatian
topics.order: Order food at a pekara in Zagreb

aiChat.systemMessage: I'm your Croatian language mentor! I'll help you practice Croatian, correct your mistakes, and explain grammar rules. What would you like to practice today?

footer.description: Your AI-powered Croatian language learning companion.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary Portal
vocabulary.subtitle: Learn, memorize, and search Croatian words
vocabulary.noWordsFound: No words found. Try a different query.
vocabulary.mediaWordsSubtitle: Words in cultural memes, music and movie clips
vocabulary.hjpNotice: Verify word etymology, declension, and syntax on HJP:
vocabulary.question: Question
